name: pff-flutterwave
description: Payment Forms for Flutterwave — create WordPress forms that bill clients for goods and services via Flutterwave (v3 Inline Checkout).
author: Shola Omofola

scripts.build-mopo: rm -R languages/pff-flutterwave-en_EN.mo && cp languages/pff-flutterwave.pot languages/pff-flutterwave-en_EN.po && wp i18n make-mo languages
scripts.translate-US: cp languages/pff-flutterwave-en_EN.po languages/pff-flutterwave-en_US.po && cp languages/pff-flutterwave-en_EN.mo languages/pff-flutterwave-en_US.mo
